title: Test coverage for GoogleAuthButton, JobFilters, SaveSearchPopover, SavedSearchesSidebar, ManualAddFormFields, and JobSearchInput
description: Adds Vitest + React Testing Library test suites for the six highest-complexity untested components: GoogleAuthButton (OAuth flow), JobFilters (URL-driven filter chips), SaveSearchPopover (save dialog), SavedSearchesSidebar (sidebar with delete), ManualAddFormFields (composite form), and JobSearchInput (debounced search).

userStories.title: GoogleAuthButton renders and handles click
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying the Google auth button renders with the correct label, delegates clicks to google.accounts.id.prompt, and handles the no-google case gracefully.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders button with default label 'Continue with Google'
Renders button with custom label when provided
Calls google.accounts.id.prompt on click
Does not throw when window.google is absent
Renders with data-testid='google-auth-button'

userStories.title: JobFilters renders chips and toggles URL params
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying filter group labels render, chips are marked active from URL params, and toggling updates/clears the param.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders Role and Experience group labels
Renders chips for all role type options
Active chip has bg-brand-500 class when param matches
Clicking active chip removes the param (clears active style)

userStories.title: SaveSearchPopover save flow
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying the save popover dialog renders, Save is disabled without a name, mutate is called with correct payload, Cancel calls onClose, and name is capped at 100 chars.
acceptanceCriteria: Dialog has aria-label 'Save this search'
Save button disabled when name is empty
mutate called with trimmed name and filters (excluding page/per_page)
onClose called when Cancel is clicked
Name input capped at MAX_SAVE_NAME_LENGTH (100)

userStories.title: SavedSearchesSidebar renders and deletes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying the sidebar returns null when empty, renders search names, shows new-match badges, calls onApply on row click, and calls delete mutation on trash click.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns null when searches array is empty
Renders search name for each saved search
Shows new_matches_count badge when count > 0
Calls onApply with search object on row click
Calls deleteMutation.mutate with search id on delete click

userStories.title: ManualAddFormFields form field rendering and interaction
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying required inputs have aria-required, DuplicateWarning shows on duplicate, mutation error alert appears, and onChange callbacks fire.
acceptanceCriteria: Role title input has aria-required='true'
Company input has aria-required='true'
DuplicateWarning rendered when isDuplicate is true
Error alert shown when mutationError is set and no duplicate
setRoleTitle called with new value on input change

userStories.title: JobSearchInput renders and debounces
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying the search input renders with the correct aria-label, initializes from URL q param, and updates its controlled value on change.
acceptanceCriteria: Input has aria-label 'search jobs'
Initializes value from q search param
Updates controlled value on change
Debounce timer runs without throwing

rationale: Continued systematic test coverage expansion targeting the remaining untested components by line-count priority. GoogleAuthButton and JobFilters are critical UI surfaces with no prior coverage.
